name: GBrain
description: Eva Brain/GBrain tools and OpenClaw OAuth-backed media extraction route.

gbrainBin.description: Path to the gbrain executable. Defaults to gbrain on PATH.

openclawBin.description: Path to the openclaw executable. Defaults to openclaw on PATH.

workingDir.description: Working directory for spawned gbrain/openclaw commands.

extractionModel.description: OpenClaw provider/model used for OAuth-backed extraction.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum milliseconds for GBrain/OpenClaw subprocess calls.
